rationale: We’ve defined the filter condition; running it will apply the filter to show only records whose Short description contains the target string, enabling us to find duplicates to delete.

action_text: Press Enter in the Short description filter value field to execute the filter
rationale: If clicking Run isn’t necessary, pressing Enter in the value box often executes the filter; this is a quick alternative to apply the filter.

action_text: Click the Short description column header to sort by it
rationale: Once filtered, sorting by Short description will group identical descriptions together, making duplicates easy to spot for deletion.

action_text: Click Add AND Condition to add another filter criterion
rationale: To target non-task-associated duplicates, we can start adding another filter condition (e.g., Source ID or Parent is empty); this begins that process.

action_text: Click Show column search row to display per-column filters
rationale: Showing the per-column search row provides quick, column-specific filtering to refine or confirm duplicates directly in the Short description column.
